data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an organizer override for manual approvals. However, the evidence does not explicitly demonstrate that the system allows an organizer to manually approve or override the release of unpaid seats. The linked use case mentions that the system warns the organizer and releases unpaid seats unless overridden, but it does not provide concrete evidence of the override functionality being implemented or tested, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the organizer's ability to manually approve or override unpaid seat releases.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
